response.justification: While Sarah brings 20 years of solid software engineering experience and demonstrated leadership through staff roles and entrepreneurial ventures, she lacks the core specialization this role requires. Her AI experience is recent and infrastructure-focused (MCP frameworks), not strategic or platform-focused. The position seeks someone with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products/platforms, preferably with advanced AI credentials. Her background is in general software excellence, testing practices, and infrastructure—areas valuable for a senior IC, but insufficient for a Principal Engineer whose primary mandate is AI strategy.
strengths: 20 years of diverse engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with demonstrated staff-level leadership and technical breadth
Proven ability to inspire and mentor others through workshops, teaching, and open-source contributions; capable of communicating complex technical ideas
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective (founder since 2016), showing ability to conceive, build, and sustain products with vision
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise; only recent infrastructure work with MCP frameworks, no background in AI model development, training, or strategic AI product deployment
No evidence of strategic advisory or consulting experience advising enterprise customers on technology adoption, which is a core responsibility of this role
Lacks cloud platform expertise; while having some AWS/Kubernetes exposure, no indication of deep engagement with cloud architecture strategy or platform evolution
